invert_api_contract.task_input: DeterministicRandomizedTask with items list and expected_items oracle
invert_api_contract.classification_basis: unique visit traces across repeated executions with output-set validation

adapter_note: Any wrapper that re-implements ItemProcessor + visit_fn on external code defines the trace surface and reintroduces detector-task co-design; not externally valid under frozen-detector discipline.
main_blocker: Frozen Class E detector requires INVERT ItemProcessor(items, visit_fn, seed) + process_all() + DeterministicRandomizedTask expected_items oracle; arbitrary Python and EffiBench-X competitive-programming solutions abstain (no_item_processor_class or execution_failed) without a substantive adapter that encodes visit traces.
